summary: Re-tested Pierre-Olivier Caouette financial advisor website after session persistence fixes. Backend remains 100% functional. Session persistence issues have been significantly improved - users can now log in and navigate to authenticated pages successfully within a session.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab interaction has selector issues but tabs are visible and functional
ui_bugs.details: Tabs are rendered correctly but automated test selectors need refinement

ui_bugs.issue: Session doesn't persist between different browser instances (normal behavior)
ui_bugs.selector: Auth state in new browser windows
ui_bugs.details: Expected behavior - sessions work correctly within same browser session

integration_issues.issue: Need to verify iframe content loading for calculator tools
integration_issues.details: Tools page shows correctly but detail page iframe content needs verification

passed_tests: Session persistence within browser session ✅ FIXED
Profile page accessible after login ✅ FIXED
Profile page loads with user data
Contact form submission with success confirmation
Tools page shows 2 demo tools correctly
Admin page redirects properly for non-admin users
action_item_for_main_agent: Session persistence major improvement confirmed! Minor issues remain: 1) Refine profile tab interaction selectors for better UX, 2) Verify tool detail iframe content displays calculator properly, 3) Complete admin panel tool creation testing. The critical session bug has been successfully resolved.
